query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, acp.id as crmId, acp.orbitEnabled
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN agent_crm_profiles acp ON acp.userId = u.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Nickie%' OR u.name LIKE '%McGregor%' OR u.email LIKE '%nickie%' OR u.email LIKE '%mcgregor%'
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4PycK9Y631tLhJa.0110aa12e67a --database PdcDVQRp8zC2FzsyWBWptW --execute
